category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Belgium EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入比利时：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入比利時：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Belgium (NBN / CREG / Elia) and EU CE framework expectations, including IEC 61851, IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2 compatibility, electrical protection-device requirements, national installation rules, and AFIR obligations. Regional regulators VREG (Flanders), CWaPE (Wallonia), and BRUGEL (Brussels) each apply distribution-network connection rules, and Dutch/French-language documentation is commonly required.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与比利时（NBN / CREG / Elia）及欧盟CE框架要求对照，涵盖IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2兼容性、保护装置要求、国家安装规则及AFIR义务。区域监管机构VREG（弗兰德）、CWaPE（瓦隆）、BRUGEL（布鲁塞尔）各自执行配电网接入规则，通常需要提供荷语和法语文件。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與比利時（NBN / CREG / Elia）及歐盟CE框架要求對照，涵蓋IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2相容性、保護裝置要求、國家安裝規則及AFIR義務。區域監管機構VREG（法蘭德斯）、CWaPE（瓦隆）、BRUGEL（布魯塞爾）各自執行配電網接入規則，通常需要提供荷語和法語文件。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, electrical-installation design, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and installers should verify current Belgium (NBN / CREG / Elia) and EU-CE requirements before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定、电气安装设计、并网或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行比利时（NBN / CREG / Elia）及欧盟CE相关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定、電氣安裝設計、併網或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行比利時（NBN / CREG / Elia）及歐盟CE相關要求。

answer_first.en: For Belgium-bound EV chargers, the most critical gaps are Type 2/CCS2 connector alignment under IEC 62196, compatibility with AFIR obligations as implemented through member-state practice, CE conformity evidence under LVD/EMC/RED where in scope, RCD/RDC protection per Belgian installation practice, and CREG/Elia/regional DSO (VREG/CWaPE/BRUGEL) installation and grid-operator coordination. 230/400 V 50 Hz parameters are required for project readiness. Dutch and French-language technical documentation is commonly required by Belgian installers and project owners. Antwerp and Zeebrugge are the primary entry ports.
answer_first.zh: 对于比利时，关键差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2与CCS2接口一致性、成员国实施下AFIR义务、适用范围内的LVD/EMC/RED合规证据、比利时安装规范下的RCD/RDC保护，以及CREG/Elia和区域配电运营商（VREG/CWaPE/BRUGEL）并网/项目协调要求。须以230/400 V、50 Hz参数完成交付准备。比利时安装商和项目业主通常要求提供荷语和法语技术文件。安特卫普和泽布吕赫为主要入境口岸。
answer_first.zht: 對於比利時，關鍵差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2與CCS2介面一致性、會員國實施下AFIR義務、適用範圍內的LVD/EMC/RED合規證據、比利時安裝規範下的RCD/RDC保護，以及CREG/Elia和區域配電運營商（VREG/CWaPE/BRUGEL）併網/專案協調要求。須以230/400 V、50 Hz參數完成交付準備。比利時安裝商和項目業主通常要求提供荷語和法語技術文件。安特衛普和澤布呂赫為主要入境口岸。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
